name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Louisville, KY's Superb Cash Advance at 208 W Broadway offers quick payday and title loans with fast approval.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates a standalone storefront at 208 W Broadway in Louisville, Kentucky, providing convenient access to short-term lending services. The location is open Monday through Friday from 8:30 AM to 8:30 PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM, making it accessible for weekday and weekend visits throughout Louisville.

This Louisville branch provides payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit solutions for residents facing unexpected financial needs. Call 502-483-0486 to discuss your borrowing options, learn about rates specific to Kentucky, or apply over the phone before visiting in person.

If you're a Louisville resident needing cash quickly, bring a valid government-issued ID, recent pay stubs or proof of income, and a recent bank statement to expedite the application process. Superb Cash Advance processes loans fast, with many approvals completed within hours.
pros: Same-day funding available for approved borrowers
No credit check required for application
Minimal documentation needed for quick approval
Flexible, customized payment schedules tailored to individual budgets
Serves all credit types including bad credit borrowers
Physical storefront location for in-person consultation and same-day cash access
cons: No interest rates or fee information disclosed on website—critical terms hidden from consumers
Short loan terms typical of payday products create debt cycle risk
Customer reviews reference Arvada location despite Atlanta address, suggesting review authenticity issues
Unsecured loans up to $50,000 marketed without APR or affordability disclosures
No mention of alternative financial counseling or debt prevention resources
best_for: Individuals with poor or no credit history facing immediate financial emergencies
Workers needing same-day cash who cannot wait for traditional bank processing
Borrowers willing to accept high-APR short-term loans for urgent bills or unexpected expenses
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for consumers in genuine financial emergencies who cannot access traditional banking and need same-day funds, though borrowers should carefully verify all APRs and fees before accepting any loan, as the website provides zero transparency on borrowing costs. The critical caveat is that payday and cash advance loans typically carry extremely high interest rates (often 300-400% APR) and short terms that frequently trap borrowers in repeat-borrowing cycles, making these products suitable only for true one-time emergencies, not ongoing financial management.
services: Same-day approval loans with minimal documentation
Second lien title loans (mentioned in customer reviews)
Flexible payment scheduling customized to borrower budgets
Fast application process with quick approval
meta_description: Superb Cash Advance at 208 W Broadway, Louisville, KY. Fast payday and title loans with quick approval.
